appliedUpdates.description: Added browser-validation notes about falling back to direct execution when Task-based flow validators fail to launch and about left-side targeting for fixture Active → Inactive drops.

notes: This rerun tested only the previously failed assertion VAL-CROSS-004 after the profile-switch filter-context fix landed.

The dedicated Task subagent launcher still failed in this environment because it resolved to an invalid custom model name, so the validator executed the browser flow directly in the parent worker session.
VAL-CROSS-004 now passes: profile switching preserved the active Workshop + 'hug' filter context and recomputed the visible results for the Builder dataset without console errors.
